name: com.mabar.multiplayer
description: Lightweight Unity multiplayer SDK for turn-based and casual games.

samples.description: OnGUI turn-based game demo + headless A/B/C/D console simulation.
Cross-platform chat room — Unity ↔ Web. Uses mabar_room (relay). Share Room ID ke browser.
Cross-platform TicTacToe — Unity ↔ Web. Pakai mabar_room, room bisa di-share antar platform.
